creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Re: comment #15 (2023-03-20)

Two commits on 2023-03-24: 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/70421fd527e315bbc4850db2d7e80fc008393bce> to stable/13

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/d7ae385428ae8df4b5a39f752b389a9375597748> to releng 13/2

> mbuf: Fix an offset calculation in m_apply_extpg_one()

Should we close this bug 264943 as a duplicate of later bug 270190, or is further investigation planned?
